name: Pathing
author: Poki
description: Pathing is a skill game where you guide cute animals to their destination! Speed up when the path is clear, dodge obstacles, and collect coins along the way. Unlock various adorable animal skins as you progress. Don’t worry if you get stuck—you can use the skip button to move past tricky levels. Can you help every animal reach the finish line? How to play Pathing? Left click to accelerate, right click to decelerate Who created Pathing? Pathing is created by MHP Indie Labs. Play their other games on Poki: Golfinity ! How can I play Pathing for free? You can play Pathing for free on Poki. Can I play Pathing on mobile devices and desktop? Pathing can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
